Restriction: Permission of instructor.

GREK688 Special Topics in Greek Literature (3 Credits) Repeatable to: 9 credits if content differs.

GREK699 Independent Study in Greek Literature (1-3 Credits) Prerequisite: Permission of ARHU-Classics department. Repeatable to: 6 credits if content differs.

GREK799 Master's Thesis Research (1-6 Credits)
